landing.demo_desc: Explore hyper-local weather data for villages across India.

dashboard.fungal_details: High humidity detected. Inspect crops for early signs of blight.

forecast.title: Atmospheric Forecasting
forecast.subtitle: Real-time predictive modeling based on village-level sensor arrays and satellite multispectral data.

analytics.title: Crop Intelligence
analytics.subtitle: Real-time monitoring of photosynthesis velocity, cellular hydration, and developmental phenology.

calendar.title: AI Farming Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Your personalized agricultural timeline based on crop lifecycle and real-time weather data.

alerts.title: Disaster Alerts
alerts.heavy_rain_warning: Heavy rainfall expected in the next 24 hours. Protect crops and ensure proper drainage.
alerts.flood_warning: High flood risk detected. Move livestock to higher ground and clear all drainage channels.
alerts.heatwave_warning: Severe heatwave alert. Increase irrigation frequency and provide shade to sensitive crops.
alerts.drought_warning: Prolonged dry spell detected. Implement water conservation techniques and mulching.
alerts.optimal_weather: Weather conditions are stable and optimal for farming activities.

actions.proceed_with_activities: Safe to proceed with farm work

satellite.monitoring: Satellite monitoring for your farm location
satellite.satellite_info: Data combined from ESA Sentinel-2B and Landsat 9. Last pixel-clearing cloud mask applied 4h ago.
satellite.hover_info: Hover over map areas for point-level NDVI data

features.subtitle: Platform Features
features.title: Everything Your Farm Needs
features.description: From village-level weather to AI-powered crop advisories, KrushiSarthi has you covered.

weather.title: Weather Forecasting
weather.desc: Hyper-local hourly forecasts powered by satellite data and ML models for your exact location.

risk.title: Risk Prediction
risk.desc: AI-powered crop risk assessment using Random Forest & XGBoost for weather-related damage.

advisory.title: Crop Advisory
advisory.desc: Smart recommendations for irrigation, fertilization, and pest control based on real-time data.

pests.title: Pest Detection
pests.desc: Predict pest and disease outbreaks by analyzing humidity, temperature, and weather patterns.

alerts.title: Smart Alerts
alerts.desc: Instant notifications for storms, heatwaves, drought, and frost via SMS and push alerts.

mapping.title: Farm Mapping
mapping.desc: Interactive maps with rain heatmaps, wind direction, and soil moisture layers.

how_it_works.subtitle: Simple Process
how_it_works.title: How KrushiSarthi Works
how_it_works.description: Get started in minutes - no technical knowledge required.

step1.title: Pin Your Farm
step1.desc: Enter your village location or use GPS to set your farm's exact coordinates on the map.

step2.title: Add Your Crops
step2.desc: Tell us what you grow - we customize every alert and advisory for your specific crops.

step3.title: Get Live Alerts
step3.desc: Receive real-time notifications for any weather event that could affect your field.

step4.title: Boost Your Yield
step4.desc: Use data-driven insights to make smarter decisions and maximize farm profitability.

schemes.subtitle: Government Support
schemes.title: Government Schemes for Farmers
schemes.description: Explore Maharashtra and Central Government schemes that support farmers with subsidies, insurance, irrigation assistance, and financial benefits.

dos_donts.subtitle: Disease Prevention
dos_donts.title: Do's & Don'ts for Common Diseases
dos_donts.description: Follow these guidelines to prevent and manage common crop diseases.

t1.name: Ramesh Singh
t1.content: KrushiSarthi helped me save my wheat crop during an unexpected heatwave. The 6-hour advance warning gave me time to irrigate and protect my harvest.

t2.name: Priya Devi
t2.content: The pest prediction feature is incredible! I was able to prevent a fungal outbreak in my tomato crop before it spread. Highly recommended for all farmers.

t3.name: Suresh Kumar
t3.content: The weather forecasts are so accurate for my village. I've reduced my irrigation costs by 40% and improved my rice yield significantly.
